creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: That would certainly fit MY bill. The thing with LTO is that in essence the code generation moves into the "linker" stage which in fact, with LTO, is also the final cross-module optimizing compiler stage... Earlier LTO implementations were single-threaded and thus crap slow. (Tried that with graphics/rawtherapee or g.../darktable, the latter of which has different LTO issues though)
